Name: SUNLU PLA 3D Printer Filament PLA Filament 1.75mm, Neatly Wound 3D Printing Filament 1.75mm, Dimensional Accuracy +/- 0.02 mm, Fit Most FDM 3D Printers, 1kg Spool (2.2lbs), Black
Purpose: PLA filament will be used to 3D print all custom components for the project, including the base, gripper arms, linkage system, and servo housing. Based on the overall design and estimated material usage, approximately 1 kg of filament is required to manufacture all parts.

Purpose: The battery holder will be used to provide stable  power to the SG90 servo to work properly.

Purpose: This microcontroller will control the movement of the gripper.

Name: WWZMDiB SG90 Micro Servo Motor for Arduino Raspberry Pi DIY (3 Pcs)

Purpose: The jumper wires will connect the controller to the servo (signal) and provide shared ground while the battery pack powers the servo.
